blocks.content: The officials headed to their respective quarters.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: What are you doing right now?!
Kido was watching, and Havitz was lying on the bed, blinking.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: You brought up Shirone. Did you forget the deal? The condition for handing over the world…

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: You get Shirone.
Havitz sat up abruptly.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: It's a good strategy. If Shirone accepts my deal, it's good for you too.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: You can't win his heart that way. Stick to the original plan. Stop deviating.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: You're the one deviating.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: What?
Havitz pointed at Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: The power of History Search. If Kashan becomes the leadership council, you can unite humanity under Ultima.
That was why Uorin was confident Shirone would come to her.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: So what? I said I'd give you the power once I achieve what I want.
Even among the lineage of Mitochondrial Eve, Uorin was the only one with foresight.
When she looked at something, the path it would take in the future appeared as lines of light.
The apple she was looking at had faint light flowing along its surface.
After a moment, the light in the shape of a hand connected with the apple's light and dropped the apple.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's not a big deal.
Uorin turned her gaze at Havitz's words.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Seeing future movements. That much can be predicted.
The reason foresight was powerful.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: The true value is revealed when you close your eyes. That's the secret you wanted to hide.
When Uorin saw nothing, the timeline could expand infinitely.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Because all signals are connected.
Havitz's fingertip, the table it touched, the floor connected to the table, the ground connected to the floor.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: You end up controlling history. Manipulating the variables within it.
Havitz picked up the apple.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: So, what do you think?
The golden timeline swayed massively.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: If I drop this apple here, what happens 200 kilometers away?
The apple rolled on the floor.
Kido would pick it up, and by tomorrow it would rot, and the cleaner would collect it.
Of course, the apple would end up in the trash, becoming food for insects…
'When the timeline is accelerated endlessly.'
Changes would occur in the colony where the insects lived, resulting in biological changes in 10,000 units…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Stop.
Uorin stopped thinking.
The foresight expanded the more you delved into it, eventually overloading the brain.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Impressive.
Even without Uorin explaining, Havitz saw everything with the divine frequency.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: My trivial action of dropping an apple changes the history of insects. It's like being a god.
Uorin wrinkled her nose because those insects could become humans.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Seeing with eyes has limits. History Search's range is too vast. At best…

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Finding Ra Enemy.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: No, no. There are no limits to the power. It's because your brain is human.
Havitz pondered for a moment.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: I heard there's still a Gaian brain…
Uorin's eyes flared with killing intent, and hot anger rose in her chest.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: What are you trying to say?

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Don't forget why I kept you alive. If I tried to take it by force, you'd kill yourself, so I had no choice but to go along with your will…

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: It was a power he desperately wanted.
If foresight passes to Shirone, I might feel anger for the first time.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Havitz headed for the door.
My method might be better. Think about it.
If he crossed into the Kashan area, there would be chaos, but there was no way to stop him.
As the door closed, Kido spoke.

blocks.speaker: Kido
blocks.content: I don't like it. It was an impossible deal from the start. He wants your power too much and is just using you. If this continues…

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Shut up.
Kido's eyes hardened.

blocks.speaker: Kido
blocks.content: Get a grip! Even if you create Ultima, Shirone already loves someone else!
